FAX: (612) 371-3207
CABLE ADDRESS
CABLES MINNEAPOLIS
WAYZATA OFFICE
726 EAST LAKE STREET
WAYZATA, MINNESOTA 55391

WRITER'S DIRECT DIAL NUMBER

(612) 371-3240

February 5, 1990

Mr. John Larson, Chairman
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804

Dear Mr. Larson:

My name is Harlan A. Loeb.  I plan to lobby in California
on behalf of the National Association of Real Estate Appraisers.
My lobbying efforts will consist only of phone calls and mailing
to legislative officials concerning state certification and
licensing of real estate appraisers.

While I do not think I must register with the Ethical
Practices Board, in the event I am mistaken, please forward an
application to the above-referenced address.

Thank you for your courtesy.

LINDQUIST & VENNUM

Sincerely,

Harlan A. Loeb

HAL:pmg

embedding.qa_text: February 5, 1990 Mr. John Larson, Chairman Fair Political Practices Commission 428 J Street, Suite 800 P.O. Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 Dear Mr. Larson: My name is Harlan A. Loeb. I plan to lobby in California on behalf of the National Association of Real Estate Appraisers. My lobbying efforts will consist only of phone calls and mailing to legislative officials concerning state certification and licensing of real estate appraisers. While I do not think I must register with the Ethical Practices Board, in the event I am mistaken, please forward an application to the above-referenced address. Thank you for your courtesy. Sincerely, Harlan A. Loeb

My lobbying efforts will consist only of phone calls and mailing to legislative officials concerning state certification and licensing of real estate appraisers. While I do not think I must register with the Ethical Practices Board, in the event I am mistaken, please forward an application to the above-referenced address. Thank you for your courtesy.
